nodes.label: iPhone 15 Pro Natural Titanium Device Frame
nodes.description: Transparent-screen device frame PNG for iPhone 15 Pro in Natural Titanium finish. The screen area is fully transparent to allow recorded video to show through. Features a thin metallic bezel with natural titanium beige/gold hue, Dynamic Island cutout at the top of the display area, and rounded corners matching the device profile.

nodes.label: iPhone 15 Pro default device frame
nodes.description: Default/base iPhone 15 Pro device frame PNG with a transparent screen cutout. The bezel appears in a silver/titanium finish. Used as a mask/frame overlay for wrapping screen recordings in the Maya app.
